title: 10 medicinal preparations of Datura stramonium (jimsonweed)
intro: Datura stramonium has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for treating a range of ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves can be made into a tea that calms the nervous system, while the roots can be used to create a tincture that relieves digestive discomfort. Additionally, the plant's seeds have been used in traditional medicine to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
intro_desc: Datura stramonium has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments. These preparations are traditionally used to treat conditions like anxiety, insomnia, and pain, as well as to induce sweating in cases of fever. However, due to its toxic nature, its use is highly regulated and requires careful administration under the guidance of a qualified practitioner. Its antispasmodic and analgesic properties also make it useful for treating muscle spasms and inflammation.
